description: Standard: assignment on algorithmic hiring discrimination

input.assignment: An increasing number of companies use AI-powered screening tools to filter job applicants. Civil rights groups allege these tools discriminate against disabled applicants and older workers. Write a feature.
input.known: The EEOC issued guidance on AI hiring tools in 2023. Several lawsuits are pending.

input.assignment: Local hospital closes its maternity ward citing financial losses.
The European Food Safety Authority re-approved a controversial pesticide despite new studies linking it to pollinator decline. Investigate how the decision was made and who influenced it.
input.publication_type: investigative feature for European science magazine
input.known: The pesticide was banned in 2018 and re-approved in 2025. Environmental groups are challenging the decision in the EU General Court.
